references.text: Hovenkamp, PH & F Miyamoto. 2005. A conspectus of the native and naturalized species of Nephrolepis (Nephrolepidaceae) in the world. Blumea 50: 279-322

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 8 June 2026

species.citation: (Desv.) Christ , Verh. Naturf. Ges. Basel 11 (1895) 243 ; Hovenkamp, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 4 (2012) 108; ≡ Lindsaea acutifolia Desv. , Mém. Soc. Linn. Paris 6 (1827) 312.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, Borneo, Indian Ocean, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Singapore, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao Oriental, PALAWAN.

species.citation: (Sw.) Schott , Gen. Fil. (Schott) (1834) t.3 ; Hovenkamp, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 4 (2012) 108; De Villa & Lagat, PJS 153 (2024) 1823; Raganas et al., Biodiversitas 26 (2025) 1195; ≡ Aspidium biserratum Sw. , J. Bot. (Schrader) 1800 (1801) 32. = Nephrolepis laurifolia (Christ) Proctor , Mem. New York Bot. Gard. 53 (1989) 262; ≡ Nephrolepis acuta var. laurifolia Christ , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 23 (1896) 355. = Nephrolepis biserrata var. furcans (T.Moore) L.H.Bailey , Stand. Cycl. Hort. 4 (1916) 2132. = Tectaria fraxinea Cav. , Descr. Pl. (Cavanilles) (1801) 250; Type: Nee s.n. (BM, fragm., MA), Philippines. = Nephrolepis macrophylla C.Presl , Abh. Königl. Böhm. Ges. Wiss., 5th Ser. 6 (1851) 403; Type: Cuming 22 (PRC, holo; BM, iso), Philippines.
species.distribution: Africa, America, ?Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, Cambodia, China, Hong Kong, India, Indian Ocean, Japan, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. ALABAT, BASIAO, BASILAN, BATAN, BATANES, BILIRAN, BOHOL, CAGBALETE, CEBU, GENERAL ISLAND, LEYTE, LUZON: Apayao, Aurora, Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Cavite, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Kalinga, Laguna, NCR, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MAMBAHENAUHAN, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, Davao de Oro, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Oriental (photos), Sultan Kudarat, Surigao, Surigao del Norte, Zamboanga Sibugay, Zamboanga del Norte, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALASAN, PALAWAN, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIASI.

species.citation: (Desv.) Hovenkamp & Miyam. , Blumea 50 (2005) 293 ; Hovenkamp, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 4 (2012) 110; ≡ Nephrodium brownii Desv. , Mém. Soc. Linn. Paris 6 (1827) 252. = Nephrolepis acutangula C.Presl , Tent. Pterid. (1836) 79. = Nephrolepis pubescens Copel. , PJS 81 (1952) 12; Type: BS 11539 (MICH), Philippines. = Nephrolepis multiflora (Roxb.) F.M.Jarrett ex C.V.Morton , Contr. U.S. Natl. Herb. 38 (1974) 309; ≡ Davallia multiflora Roxb. , Calcutta J. Nat. Hist. 4 (1844) 515.

BALABAC, BASILAN, BATAN, BILIRAN, BOHOL, CAMIGUIN, CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUBANG, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Aurora, Batangas, Benguet, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, Isabela, Kalinga, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Sultan Kudarat, Surigao, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Norte, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, POLILLO, SABTANG, SAMAR, SIARGAO, TAWI-TAWI.

species.citation: (L.) C.Presl , Tent. Pterid. (1836) 79 ; Hovenkamp, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 4 (2012) 111; Rufila et al., Ruhuna J. Science 13 (2022) 158; Pescuela et al., PJS 153 (2024) 665; ≡ Polypodium cordifolium L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 1089. = Nephrolepis auriculata (L.) Trimen , J. Linn. Soc., Bot. 24 (1887) 152; ≡ Polypodium auriculatum L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 1088.

Philipp. (1905) 178; Type: Copeland 1286 (MICH), Philippines.

species.citation: (Burm.f.) Kuhn , Ann. Mus. Bot. Lugduno-Batavi 4 (1869) 285 ; Hovenkamp, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 4 (2012) 120; ≡ Polypodium radicans Burm.f. , Fl. Ind. (N. L. Burman) (1768) 233. = Nephrolepis clementis Christ , PJS 3c (1908) 272; Type: Clemens 920 (P), Philippines. = Nephrolepis volubilis (Fée) J.Sm. , J. Bot. (Hooker) 3 (1841) 413; ≡ Lepidonevron volubile Fée , Mém. Foug., 5. Gen. Filic. (1852) 301; Type: Cuming 37 (P, holo; BM, iso), Philippines.

species.citation: (Afzel. ex Sw.) J.Sm. , Bot. Mag. 72(Companion) (1846) 35 bis ; Hovenkamp, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 4 (2012) 121; ≡ Aspidium undulatum Afzel. ex Sw. , J. Bot. (Schrader) 1800 (1801) 32. = Nephrolepis glabra Copel. , PJS 1(Suppl.) (1906) 146; Type: Copeland 1819 (MICH, holo; KYO, P, SING, iso), Philippines.
